prompt: Review expenses EXP-6882 and EXP-9882; report each name, expense date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either retrieval omits a requested field, label it unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Poster printing invoice (EXP-6882) only, set the expense date to 2026-11-19. Leave EXP-9882 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for EXP-6882: set the expense date to 2026-12-23, not 2026-11-19. The other expense must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first expense date.
Replace the superseded expense date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both expense date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected expense date as current and the first requested expense date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by either get result as unknown.
